items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This study found that individuals after ACL reconstruction exhibited lower triceps surae electromyographic activity during single-leg jumping tasks compared to healthy controls, with some bilateral differences within the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后患者单腿跳跃时比健康对照组小腿三头肌的肌电活动更低。在评估重返运动时，除了股四头肌和腘绳肌，别忘了检查小腿三头肌的神经肌肉功能。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后患者单腿跳跃任务中小腿三头肌的神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，ACL 重建术后患者在单腿跳跃时的小腿三头肌肌电活动低于健康对照组，且 ACLR 组内部存在双侧差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Individuals post-ACL reconstruction show lower triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumps compared to healthy controls. When assessing return-to-sport, remember to check triceps surae neuromuscular function in addition to quadriceps and hamstrings.
items.limitation: 研究未报告效应量或具体的P值/置信区间。
items.limitationEn: The study did not report effect sizes or specific p-values/confidence intervals.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey investigated factors influencing physical therapists' clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients following ACL injury, aiming to understand current application and concordance with research.
items.curatedReason: 血流限制训练（BFRT）在儿童和青少年 ACL 损伤患者中的应用情况。该调查提供了当前临床实践的快照，但并未提供具体疗效的证据。
items.titleZh: 影响儿童和青少年前交叉韧带损伤患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面调查研究探讨了物理治疗师在为儿童和青少年 ACL 损伤患者决定是否采用血流限制训练（BFRT）时的影响因素，旨在了解其在临床中的应用与研究的契合度。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey describes the factors influencing clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients post-ACL injury. It offers a snapshot of current clinical practice but doesn't provide efficacy data.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面调查研究，无法建立因果关系，且可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional survey study, which cannot establish causality and may be subject to recall bias.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: A single-blind randomized controlled trial (N=28) compared the immediate effects of dynamic taping (DT) and sports taping (ST) on dynamic balance and proprioception in recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability, finding DT to be a comparable alternative.
items.curatedReason: 动态贴扎在改善慢性踝关节不稳患者的动态平衡和本体感觉方面，其即时效果不劣于传统运动贴扎。在临床实践中，可以根据患者偏好和具体活动需求，将其作为传统运动贴扎的有效替代方案。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳的娱乐性运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项单盲随机对照试验（N=28）比较了动态贴扎和运动贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳的娱乐性运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的即时效果，发现动态贴扎是一种可比拟的替代方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: Dynamic taping is non-inferior to traditional sports taping for immediate improvement in dynamic balance and proprioception in recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability. You can consider it an effective alternative in clinical practice, based on patient preference and activity demands.
items.limitation: 这是一项单盲随机对照试验，样本量相对较小（N=28），且仅评估了即时效果。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-blind randomized controlled trial with a relatively small sample size (N=28), and it only assessed immediate effects.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: [Perspectives] The art of fidelity: clinical documentation and ambient AI
items.summary: A perspective piece highlights the current limitations of ambient AI in clinical documentation, noting its tendency to miss crucial patient narratives like caregiving burden and medication adherence issues, even while accurately recording medical facts.
items.curatedReason: 人工智能在医疗记录中的应用正在改变工作流程，但你也应警惕其在抓取患者核心问题时的局限性，尤其是那些未被直接言明的社会心理因素。
items.titleZh: 人工智能病历：忠实度与临床洞察的平衡
items.summaryZh: 一篇评论文章指出，环境人工智能在临床记录方面存在局限性，它可能忽略患者重要的叙述，如护理负担和药物依从性问题，即使其医学记录准确无误。
items.curatedReasonEn: AI's application in medical documentation is transforming workflows, but you should be wary of its limitations in capturing core patient issues, especially unspoken psychosocial factors.
items.journal: The Lancet

items.title: Modified Ghost System combining action, observation, and vibration stimulation for recovery after distal radius fracture surgery: A single-arm clinical feasibility study protocol
items.summary: A single-arm feasibility study protocol outlines a modified Ghost System for distal radius fracture rehabilitation, replacing VR headsets with an iPad and wristband vibrator to improve clinical implementation and patient access. The study will enroll 10 adults post-palmar locking plate fixation.
items.curatedReason: Ghost System 的改良版，用 iPad 和腕带振动器替代笨重的 VR 头显，大大提升了临床应用的便捷性。关注这项可行性研究，看其能否为腕部骨折术后的康复训练提供新的思路。
items.titleZh: 改良 Ghost 系统结合行动观察与振动刺激，用于桡骨远端骨折术后康复：一项单臂临床可行性研究方案
items.summaryZh: 一项单臂可行性研究方案描述了一种改良的 Ghost 系统，用于桡骨远端骨折康复。该系统用 iPad 和腕带振动器替代 VR 头显，旨在提高临床应用和患者的可及性。研究将招募 10 名掌侧锁定钢板固定术后的成年患者。
items.curatedReasonEn: The modified Ghost System, replacing bulky VR headsets with an iPad and wristband vibrator, significantly enhances clinical usability. Follow this feasibility study to see if it offers new approaches for post-distal radius fracture rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心、单臂的试点可行性研究，样本量小（10 名），且没有对照组，结果的外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-center, single-arm pilot feasibility study with a small sample size (10 participants) and no control group, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Virtual Reality-assisted Physiotherapeutic Training for Patients With Knee Osteoarthritis: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 5 RCTs found that virtual reality (VR)-assisted physiotherapy significantly improved pain (SMD = 0.40, 95% CI: 0.14-0.65, P = 0.002), physical function (SMD = 0.37, 95% CI: 0.05-0.70, P = 0.003), and balance (SMD = 0.44, 95% CI: 0.16-0.72, P = 0.002) in patients with knee osteoarthritis compared to traditional rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 对于膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者，VR 辅助的物理治疗在缓解疼痛、改善身体功能和平衡方面显示出比传统康复更显著的优势。如果你的诊所还在观望 VR 技术，这份综述提供了支持将其纳入常规方案的有力证据。
items.titleZh: 虚拟现实辅助物理治疗对膝骨关节炎患者的疗效：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 5 项随机对照试验（RCT）的系统综述和荟萃分析显示，与传统康复相比，虚拟现实（VR）辅助物理治疗显著改善了膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛（SMD = 0.40, P = 0.002）、身体功能（SMD = 0.37, P = 0.003）和平衡（SMD = 0.44, P = 0.002）。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with knee osteoarthritis (KOA), VR-assisted physical therapy demonstrates significantly greater benefits in pain relief, physical function, and balance compared to traditional rehabilitation. If your clinic is still considering VR technology, this review offers strong evidence to support its inclusion in standard protocols.
items.limitation: 本系统综述仅纳入了 5 项 RCT，样本量可能偏小。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review only included 5 RCTs, which may result in a relatively small sample size.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study.
items.summary: A U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study compared combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation (PR+CR) versus PR alone in reducing post-stroke dementia risk among 479 propensity score-matched stroke patients aged ≥55 years with MCI. The study found a significant association between PR+CR and a reduced risk of incident post-stroke dementia.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究表明，物理康复结合认知康复可能有助于降低卒中后痴呆的风险。如果你在治疗卒中后轻度认知障碍患者，应考虑将认知康复策略整合到你的物理治疗计划中。
items.titleZh: 物理和认知康复结合与卒中后痴呆的关联：一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究，对 479 对经过倾向得分匹配的卒中后轻度认知障碍患者（年龄≥55岁）进行了比较，发现物理康复结合认知康复与单独物理康复相比，显著降低了卒中后痴呆的发生风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study suggests that combining physical rehabilitation with cognitive rehabilitation may help reduce the risk of post-stroke dementia. If you are treating patients with mild cognitive impairment after stroke, consider integrating cognitive rehabilitation strategies into your physical therapy plans.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性观察研究，可能存在混杂因素，无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective observational study, which may have confounding factors and cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study

items.title: The Oxford visual perception screen detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute adult stroke survivors: an early cross-sectional diagnostic accuracy study.
items.summary: A prospective cross-sectional study evaluated the Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) for detecting visual perception difficulties in sub-acute stroke survivors (within 6 weeks of stroke). The OxVPS showed good diagnostic accuracy compared to the Rivermead Perceptual Assessment Battery (RPAB).
items.curatedReason: Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) 作为一种新的筛查工具，有望在卒中后早期高效识别视觉感知困难。在临床实践中，可以考虑将 OxVPS 作为补充工具来提高早期诊断率。
items.titleZh: 牛津视觉感知筛查表在亚急性期卒中幸存者中检测视觉感知困难：一项早期横断面诊断准确性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性横断面研究评估了牛津视觉感知筛查表（OxVPS）在亚急性期（卒中后 6 周内）卒中幸存者中检测视觉感知困难的准确性，结果显示 OxVPS 与 Rivermead 感知评估量表（RPAB）相比具有良好的诊断准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) shows promise as a new screening tool for efficient early detection of visual perception difficulties in sub-acute stroke survivors. In clinical practice, consider OxVPS as a supplementary tool to improve early diagnosis rates.
items.limitation: 这项研究是早期诊断准确性研究，需要进一步验证其长期效果和广泛适用性。
items.limitationEn: This is an early-phase diagnostic accuracy study, requiring further validation for long-term effectiveness and broad applicability.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: A difference-in-differences analysis using Medicare claims data (n=62,217 beneficiaries) found that the Comprehensive Care for Joint Replacement (CJR) mandatory bundled payment model did not significantly increase the proportion of hospitals delivering prehabilitation for lower extremity joint replacement in the U.S.
items.curatedReason: 美国强制性捆绑支付模式（CJR）的实施，并未显著增加下肢关节置换术前的康复（prehabilitation）服务。这提示我们，仅靠支付政策可能不足以推动术前康复的广泛采用，还需要结合其他激励措施和教育。如果你在做医保政策倡导，可以把这个发现列入考虑。
items.titleZh: 强制性捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复服务交付的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项使用 Medicare 理赔数据（n=62,217 名受益人）的差异分析发现，综合关节置换护理（CJR）强制性捆绑支付模式并未显著增加美国提供下肢关节置换术前康复服务的医院比例。
items.curatedReasonEn: The implementation of the mandatory bundled payment model (CJR) in the U.S. did not significantly increase prehabilitation services for lower extremity joint replacement. This suggests that payment policies alone may be insufficient to drive widespread adoption of prehabilitation, requiring additional incentives and education. If you are involved in healthcare policy advocacy, consider this finding.
items.limitation: 这是一项基于医保理赔数据的回顾性差异分析，可能存在未调整的混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective difference-in-differences analysis based on Medicare claims data, which may have unadjusted confounding factors.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=140) compared a 6-week cardiovascular rehabilitation program with usual care for TIA and mild stroke patients. The intervention significantly improved functional exercise capacity, physical activity, anthropometrics, blood pressure, quality of life, anxiety, and depression over 6 months.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 证实了心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）和轻度卒中患者在功能性运动能力、身体活动水平及生活质量方面的益处，且效果能维持 6 个月。将心血管康复纳入 TIA 和轻度卒中患者的常规管理流程，你的患者将从中长期获益。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=140）比较了为期 6 周的心血管康复计划与常规护理对短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）和轻度卒中患者的疗效。干预组在 6 个月内显著改善了功能性运动能力、身体活动、人体测量学指标、血压、生活质量、焦虑和抑郁。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT confirms the benefits of cardiovascular rehabilitation for patients with transient ischaemic attack (TIA) and mild stroke in functional exercise capacity, physical activity levels, and quality of life, with effects sustained over 6 months. Incorporate cardiovascular rehabilitation into the routine management of TIA and mild stroke patients for long-term benefits.
items.limitation: 研究的随访期为 6 个月，长期效果仍需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: The follow-up period of the study was 6 months; long-term effects still require further validation.
items.journal: Clinical rehabilitation

items.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A single-center RCT (n=54) compared intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding (IOE) with continuous nasogastric tube feeding (NG) for post-stroke dysphagia. The study found IOE to be more effective in reducing reflux risk and supporting swallowing recovery.
items.curatedReason: 对于卒中后吞咽困难患者，间歇性口咽管喂养可能在降低反流风险和促进吞咽恢复方面优于持续鼻胃管喂养。评估患者依从性，将此方法纳入你的康复策略。
items.titleZh: 间歇性口咽管喂养与鼻胃管喂养对卒中后吞咽困难患者的胃动力、反流风险和临床疗效的多模态评估：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单中心随机对照试验（n=54）比较了间歇性口咽管喂养（IOE）与持续鼻胃管喂养（NG）对卒中后吞咽困难患者的疗效，发现 IOE 在降低反流风险和促进吞咽恢复方面更有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: For post-stroke dysphagia patients, intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding may be superior to continuous nasogastric tube feeding in reducing reflux risk and promoting swallowing recovery. Evaluate patient adherence and incorporate this method into your rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心研究，样本量为 54 人，可能限制了结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center study with a sample size of 54 participants, which may limit the generalizability of the results.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial

items.title: Undernutrition is associated with higher rate of reamputation or survival, lower mobility and lower quality of life following dysvascular major lower limb amputation: a longitudinal observational study
items.summary: A longitudinal observational study investigated the association between undernutrition and outcomes (survival, reamputation-free survival, quality of life, wound healing, mobility, and work status) following dysvascular major lower limb amputation. Undernutrition was associated with higher reamputation rates or survival, lower mobility, and lower quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究提示，营养不良可能与截肢患者的再截肢率、存活率、活动能力和生活质量较差有关。作为物理治疗师，在术前评估中增加营养风险筛查，并与营养师协作，以优化患者的康复结局。
items.titleZh: 营养不良与血管病变性下肢大截肢患者的再截肢或生存率、活动能力和生活质量降低相关：一项纵向观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项纵向观察性研究调查了营养不良与血管病变性下肢大截肢（LLA）后生存、免再截肢生存、生活质量（QoL）、伤口愈合、活动能力和工作状态之间的关联。研究发现，营养不良与较高的再截肢率或生存率、较低的活动能力和生活质量相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study suggests that undernutrition may be associated with higher reamputation rates, lower mobility, and lower quality of life in dysvascular major lower limb amputation patients. As a physical therapist, consider incorporating nutrition risk screening into your pre-surgical assessments and collaborating with dietitians to optimize patient rehabilitation outcomes.
items.limitation: 这是一项纵向观察性研究，无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a longitudinal observational study, which cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Towards strengthening rehabilitation within health systems: a scoping review of rehabilitation-specific quality indicators
items.summary: A scoping review aimed to identify, categorize, and appraise rehabilitation-specific quality indicators (QIs) with generic applicability for evaluating interprofessional rehabilitation care.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述识别并评估了康复领域特有的质量指标。这些指标对你评估跨专业康复护理的质量至关重要，也是推动康复服务标准化的基础。在制定康复项目或参与质量改进时，可以参考这些指标。
items.titleZh: 加强卫生系统内康复：一项康复特异性质量指标的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述旨在识别、分类和评估具有通用适用性的康复特异性质量指标（QIs），以评估跨专业康复护理。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review identifies and appraises rehabilitation-specific quality indicators. These indicators are crucial for you to evaluate the quality of interprofessional rehabilitation care and serve as a foundation for standardizing rehabilitation services. Refer to these indicators when developing rehabilitation programs or participating in quality improvement initiatives.
items.limitation: 范围综述主要在于识别和分类，并未对质量指标的实际效果进行验证。
items.limitationEn: The scoping review primarily focuses on identification and categorization, without validating the actual effectiveness of the quality indicators.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Physiotherapists' knowledge, attitude and practice of motor learning in stroke rehabilitation.
items.summary: A survey of 40 South African physiotherapists described their knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation. The respondents' main area of interest was widely spread.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查揭示了南非物理治疗师在卒中康复中对运动学习的知识、态度和实践现状。如果你是临床教育者，可以从中了解现有知识差距，从而改进培训和继续教育项目。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师在卒中康复中运动学习的知识、态度和实践
items.summaryZh: 一项对 40 名南非物理治疗师的调查描述了他们在卒中康复中对运动学习的知识、态度和实践。受访者的主要兴趣领域分布广泛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey reveals the current knowledge, attitudes, and practices of South African physiotherapists regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation. If you are a clinical educator, you can use these insights to identify existing knowledge gaps and improve training and continuing education programs.
items.limitation: 本研究采用便利和滚雪球抽样，且仅有 40 名物理治疗师完成问卷，可能无法代表所有南非物理治疗师的整体情况。
items.limitationEn: This study used convenience and snowball sampling, with only 40 physiotherapists completing the survey, which may not represent the overall situation of all South African physiotherapists.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Balance Stability Characteristics of Patients with Idiopathic Normal Pressure Hydrocephalus
items.summary: This study aimed to observe the postural control problems and balance stability characteristics in patients with idiopathic normal pressure hydrocephalus (iNPH).
items.curatedReason: 这项研究观察了特发性正常颅压脑积水（iNPH）患者的姿势控制问题，揭示了该群体平衡障碍的特点。在评估 iNPH 患者时，应特别关注这些平衡稳定特征，以制定更有针对性的康复干预方案。
items.titleZh: 特发性正常颅压脑积水患者的平衡稳定性特征
items.summaryZh: 这项研究旨在观察特发性正常颅压脑积水（iNPH）患者的姿势控制问题和平衡稳定性特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study observed postural control problems in patients with idiopathic normal pressure hydrocephalus (iNPH), revealing characteristics of balance disorders in this group. When assessing iNPH patients, pay special attention to these balance stability characteristics to develop more targeted rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 研究目的为观察性，未涉及干预效果评价，且未说明样本量和具体方法学。
items.limitationEn: The study's purpose was observational and did not involve evaluation of intervention effects, and the sample size and specific methodology were not stated.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: The RESOLVE Trial: A Stepped-Wedge, Cluster-Randomized Clinical Trial Evaluating the Effects of Clinical Practice Guidelines and Psychologically Informed Physical Therapy on Low Back Pain Outcomes in Service Members and Veterans.
items.summary: A stepped-wedge, cluster-randomized trial evaluating a clinical practice guideline and psychologically informed physical therapy (CPG+PIPT) implementation strategy found it reduced LBP-related disability, pain, and healthcare utilization in military and veteran settings.
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心、阶梯式整群随机试验验证了临床指南结合心理干预策略对腰痛患者的疗效，提供了临床决策的重要依据。关注其在军事和退伍军人医疗环境中的应用。
items.titleZh: RESOLVE试验：一项评估临床实践指南和心理信息物理疗法对服役人员和退伍军人腰痛结局影响的分层整群随机临床试验。
items.titleEn: The RESOLVE Trial: A Stepped-Wedge, Cluster-Randomized Clinical Trial Evaluating the Effects of Clinical Practice Guidelines and Psychologically Informed Physical Therapy on Low Back Pain Outcomes in Service Members and Veterans.
items.summaryZh: 一项评估临床实践指南与心理信息物理疗法（CPG+PIPT）实施策略的阶梯式整群随机试验，结果显示该策略在军事和退伍军人医疗环境中可减少腰痛相关残疾、疼痛及下游医疗利用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multi-site, stepped-wedge, cluster-randomized trial validates the effectiveness of clinical guidelines combined with psychologically informed physical therapy for low back pain, offering significant clinical decision-making insights. Focus on its application in military and veteran healthcare settings.
items.limitation: 研究仅涵盖军事和退伍军人医疗环境，结果的外推性需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to military and veteran healthcare settings, requiring caution in extrapolating results.
items.journal: Physical therapy

items.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized, double-blinded, sham-controlled trial evaluating ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation (PENS) combined with exercise for chronic lateral elbow pain found significant long-term benefits in pain intensity, pain-related disability, and psychological outcomes compared to sham PENS.
items.curatedReason: 这项双盲随机对照试验为超声引导下经皮神经电刺激（PENS）联合运动疗法治疗慢性肱骨外上髁炎提供了强有力的中长期疗效证据。关注其对疼痛、残疾及心理结局的积极影响。
items.titleZh: 超声引导经皮神经电刺激治疗慢性肱骨外上髁痛的长期获益：一项随机对照试验。
items.titleEn: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summaryZh: 一项评估超声引导经皮神经电刺激（PENS）联合运动治疗慢性肱骨外上髁痛的随机双盲假对照试验发现，与假PENS相比，PENS在疼痛强度、疼痛相关残疾和心理结局方面具有显著的长期获益。
items.curatedReasonEn: This double-blind RCT provides robust evidence for the mid- to long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation (PENS) combined with exercise for chronic lateral elbow pain, highlighting its positive impact on pain, disability, and psychological outcomes.
items.limitation: 样本量为49例，研究仅关注肱骨外上髁炎。
items.limitationEn: The sample size is 49, and the study focuses solely on lateral elbow pain.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial

items.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy.
items.summary: An investigation into adherence to pain threshold protocols during a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy found adherence to exercise and physiotherapy sessions was high, but adherence to strict pain thresholds varied.
items.curatedReason: 这项关于慢性旋转袖肌腱病患者运动干预依从性的研究，特别是对疼痛阈值设定的详细分析，为临床实践提供了直接参考。然而，样本量不大，需关注长期依从性。
items.titleZh: 慢性肩袖肌腱病患者运动干预（含疼痛阈值、运动和物理治疗）的依从性。
items.titleEn: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy.
items.summaryZh: 一项针对慢性肩袖肌腱病患者为期26周运动干预中疼痛阈值依从性的研究发现，患者对运动和物理治疗的依从性高，但对严格疼痛阈值的依从性则有所不同。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on exercise intervention adherence in chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy, particularly its detailed analysis of pain threshold settings, offers direct clinical relevance. However, the small sample size warrants attention to long-term adherence.
items.limitation: 样本量为84例，为单一RCT研究的二次数据分析。
items.limitationEn: The sample size is 84, representing secondary data analysis from a single RCT.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy

items.title: Cost-effectiveness of Pilates compared with home-based exercises for people with chronic non-specific low back pain: a trial-based economic evaluation.
items.summary: An economic evaluation alongside a randomized controlled trial in Brazil found Pilates to be cost-effective compared to home-based exercises for chronic non-specific low back pain, from both healthcare and societal perspectives, despite not being covered by the Brazilian healthcare system.
items.curatedReason: 在巴西，普拉提比家庭锻炼对慢性非特异性腰痛更具成本效益。即便医保未覆盖，在考虑引进新疗法时，这项 RCT 结果也提示了其经济可行性。
items.titleZh: 普拉提与居家锻炼治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益比较：一项基于试验的经济学评估。
items.titleEn: Cost-effectiveness of Pilates compared with home-based exercises for people with chronic non-specific low back pain: a trial-based economic evaluation.
items.summaryZh: 一项在巴西进行的随机对照试验的经济学评估发现，与居家锻炼相比，普拉提在治疗慢性非特异性腰痛方面具有成本效益，从医疗和社会的角度来看都是如此，尽管普拉提尚未被巴西医疗系统覆盖。
items.curatedReasonEn: In Brazil, Pilates is more cost-effective than home exercises for chronic non-specific low back pain. Even if not covered by insurance, this RCT result suggests economic viability when considering new therapies.
items.limitation: 研究仅在巴西进行，且受试者年龄限定在18-50岁。
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted solely in Brazil with participants aged 18-50 years.
items.journal: BMC musculoskeletal disorders

items.title: Acute Modulation of Lumbar Motor Unit Behavior During Experimentally Induced Low Back Pain: A Motor Unit Decomposition Analysis.
items.summary: An analysis of experimentally induced acute low back pain in 33 healthy participants found that acute LBP altered lumbar motor unit discharge characteristics and reduced force steadiness during sustained spinal extension.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究通过实验诱导急性腰痛，深入分析了其对腰部运动单元行为和力量稳定性的影响，为理解腰痛的神经肌肉机制提供了新视角。
items.titleZh: 实验性诱导急性腰痛期间腰部运动单元行为的急性调节：一项运动单元分解分析。
items.titleEn: Acute Modulation of Lumbar Motor Unit Behavior During Experimentally Induced Low Back Pain: A Motor Unit Decomposition Analysis.
items.summaryZh: 对33名健康参与者进行实验性诱导急性腰痛的研究发现，急性腰痛改变了腰部运动单元的放电特征，并降低了在持续脊柱伸展任务中的力量稳定性。
items.curatedReasonEn: By experimentally inducing acute low back pain, this study deeply analyzes its impact on lumbar motor unit behavior and force steadiness, offering a new perspective on the neuromuscular mechanisms of low back pain.
items.limitation: 研究仅评估了急性腰痛的短期影响，样本量为33例健康成人。
items.limitationEn: The study only assessed the short-term effects of acute low back pain in 33 healthy adults.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review exploring lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis identified a diverse range of interventions including exercise and weight management, highlighting outcome measures used for assessment across 36 studies (29 RCTs).
items.curatedReason: 这项针对膝骨关节炎的生活方式干预的系统梳理，整合了运动和体重管理等关键策略，为临床医生提供了该领域干预手段的全面概览。
items.titleZh: 膝骨关节炎患者生活方式干预的探索：一项梳理性综述。
items.titleEn: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summaryZh: 一项对膝骨关节炎患者生活方式干预进行的梳理性综述，识别了包括运动和体重管理在内的多种干预措施，并总结了36项研究（包括29项RCT）中使用的评估结果指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review of lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis synthesizes key strategies like exercise and weight management, providing clinicians with a comprehensive overview of interventions in this field.
items.limitation: 作为梳理性综述，主要目标是识别现有研究范围，而非评估研究质量。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, the primary goal is to identify the scope of existing research rather than assess study quality.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summary: A 10-year retrospective study of physiotherapy-managed musculoskeletal disorders (MSDs) in Nigeria assessed prevalence, patterns, treatment outcomes, and costs, finding a mean age of 47.8 years and predominantly female patients among 1582 cases.
items.curatedReason: 这项在尼日利亚进行的十年回顾性研究，分析了物理治疗管理的肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、治疗结局和成本，为低收入国家提供了一个重要的循证案例。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚物理治疗管理的肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗结局和成本。
items.titleEn: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summaryZh: 一项对尼日利亚物理治疗管理的肌肉骨骼疾病（MSDs）为期十年的回顾性研究，评估了其患病率、模式、治疗结局和成本，在1582例患者中发现平均年龄为47.8岁，以女性居多。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 10-year retrospective study from Nigeria analyzes the prevalence, treatment outcomes, and costs of physiotherapy-managed musculoskeletal disorders, offering an important evidence-based case for low-income countries.
items.limitation: 研究为回顾性，且数据来自尼日利亚的一家教学医院。
items.limitationEn: The study is retrospective and data are from a single teaching hospital in Nigeria.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exploring facilitators and barriers to health behaviors in stroke survivors: a multi-perspective qualitative study of patients, families, and healthcare professionals.
items.summary: A qualitative study involving stroke survivors, family caregivers, and healthcare professionals in China explored facilitators and barriers to post-stroke health behaviors related to secondary prevention, interpreting findings through the Adaptive Leadership Framework.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究提示，卒中后二级预防的健康行为受患者、家属及医护人员多重因素影响。理解这些障碍和促进因素，有助于制定更有效的干预措施。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者健康行为的促进与障碍因素探索：一项多视角定性研究。
items.titleEn: Exploring facilitators and barriers to health behaviors in stroke survivors: a multi-perspective qualitative study of patients, families, and healthcare professionals.
items.summaryZh: 一项在中国进行的涉及卒中幸存者、家庭照顾者和医疗专业人员的研究，通过适应性领导框架探讨了与二次预防相关的卒中后健康行为的促进和障碍因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study suggests that secondary prevention health behaviors post-stroke are influenced by multiple factors from patients, families, and healthcare professionals. Understanding these barriers and facilitators can help develop more effective interventions.
items.limitation: 研究为定性研究，样本量为17例卒中幸存者、10例家属及11名医护人员，且仅限于三家康复医院。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a sample size of 17 stroke survivors, 10 family caregivers, and 11 healthcare professionals, limited to three rehabilitation hospitals.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: Transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation for stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapping current evidence on transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) for stroke rehabilitation found fragmented evidence and methodological heterogeneity, focusing on study design, stimulation parameters, and reported effects.
items.curatedReason: 这项关于经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）用于卒中康复的系统梳理，为理解该新兴神经调控技术的应用现状和局限性提供了框架。
items.titleZh: 经皮脊髓电刺激用于卒中康复：一项梳理性综述。
items.titleEn: Transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation for stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summaryZh: 一项关于经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）用于卒中康复的梳理性综述，发现了零散的证据和方法学上的异质性，重点关注了研究设计、刺激参数和报告的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review on transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) for stroke rehabilitation provides a framework for understanding the current applications and limitations of this emerging neuromodulation technique.
items.limitation: 作为梳理性综述，其主要目的是描绘现有证据，而非进行荟萃分析。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, its primary aim is to map existing evidence rather than conduct a meta-analysis.
items.journal: Topics in stroke rehabilitation

items.title: Perspectives of Private Practice Physical Therapy Health Care Systems Participating in a Pragmatic Clinical Trial: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: A qualitative study sharing the perspectives of four private practice physical therapy health care systems participating in a pragmatic clinical trial (FM-TIPS) may benefit clinicians and researchers considering non-academic settings in research.
items.curatedReason: 对于考虑在私立诊所开展临床研究的同行，这项定性研究提示了与学术机构不同的挑战与机遇。然而，仅有 4 个系统参与，结果的外推性有限。
items.titleZh: 参与实用临床试验的私营物理治疗医疗系统参与者的视角：一项定性研究。
items.titleEn: Perspectives of Private Practice Physical Therapy Health Care Systems Participating in a Pragmatic Clinical Trial: A Qualitative Study.
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究分享了参与实用临床试验（FM-TIPS）的四家私营物理治疗医疗系统的视角，可能有助于考虑非学术环境参与研究的临床医生和研究人员。
items.curatedReasonEn: For peers considering clinical research in private practice, this qualitative study highlights distinct challenges and opportunities compared to academic settings. However, with only 4 systems involved, the generalizability of findings is limited.
items.limitation: 研究的视角仅限于参与一项具体试验的四家诊所。
items.limitationEn: The perspectives are limited to four clinics involved in one specific trial.
items.journal: Physical therapy

items.title: Task-Oriented training in a Patient with Triplegia: Post-Stroke Hemiparesis Complicating Pre-Existing Contralateral Upper Extremity Paralysis: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report demonstrated that task-oriented training facilitated functional independence in a 75-year-old man with pre-existing left upper extremity paralysis who developed right hemiparesis after a stroke, showing significant improvements in Fugl-Meyer Assessment-UE scores.
items.curatedReason: 这篇病例报告展示了任务导向训练在一名复杂三瘫患者中的应用，为处理此类罕见而挑战性的病例提供了临床参考。
items.titleZh: 一名卒中后合并既往对侧上肢瘫痪的患者的三肢瘫任务导向训练：病例报告。
items.titleEn: Task-Oriented training in a Patient with Triplegia: Post-Stroke Hemiparesis Complicating Pre-Existing Contralateral Upper Extremity Paralysis: A Case Report.
items.summaryZh: 一篇病例报告展示了任务导向训练在一例卒中后出现右侧偏瘫且既往有左上肢瘫痪的75岁男性患者中，如何促进其功能独立性，其Fugl-Meyer评定量表-上肢得分有显著改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report demonstrates the application of task-oriented training in a complex triplegia patient, offering a clinical reference for managing such rare and challenging cases.
items.limitation: 这是一篇病例报告，不适用于普适性结论。
items.limitationEn: This is a case report and not generalizable.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Aspirin Matches Rivaroxaban for Blood Clot Prevention After Joint Replacement, Suggests Study
items.summary: The EPCAT III randomized trial found an aspirin-only regimen was as effective and safe as rivaroxaban for preventing symptomatic venous thromboembolism after total hip or knee arthroplasty, with no clinically significant difference in bleeding risk.
items.curatedReason: 对于全髋或全膝关节置换术后的 VTE 预防，阿司匹林与利伐沙班同样有效且安全，出血风险也无显著差异。这意味着你可以放心地为患者选择成本更低、更简便的阿司匹林方案。
items.titleZh: 研究表明：阿司匹林在关节置换术后预防血栓方面与利伐沙班效果相当
items.summaryZh: EPCAT III 随机试验发现，在全髋关节或膝关节置换术后，单纯使用阿司匹林方案在预防症状性静脉血栓栓塞方面与利伐沙班同样有效且安全，出血风险无临床显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Aspirin is as effective and safe as rivaroxaban for VTE prevention after total hip or knee arthroplasty, with no significant difference in bleeding risk. You can confidently choose the more cost-effective and simpler aspirin regimen for your patients.
items.limitation: 摘要未提供详细的患者风险分层信息，结果可能主要适用于标准风险患者。
items.limitationEn: The abstract does not provide detailed patient risk stratification information, so the results may primarily apply to standard-risk patients.

items.title: Moderate, Home-Based Exercise Proven Safe for Aortic Dissection Survivors, find researchers
items.summary: Researchers have found that moderate, home-based exercise is safe for survivors of aortic dissection, providing important insights for their rehabilitation and long-term management.
items.curatedReason: 请注意：中等强度的居家运动对主动脉夹层幸存者是安全的。这条证据打破了以往对这类高危患者运动限制的顾虑，为你制定和推荐康复运动方案提供了重要依据。
items.titleZh: 研究人员发现：中等强度居家运动对主动脉夹层幸存者安全有效
items.summaryZh: 研究人员发现，中等强度的居家运动对主动脉夹层幸存者是安全的，这为其康复和长期管理提供了重要见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: Please note: moderate, home-based exercise is safe for aortic dissection survivors. This evidence challenges previous concerns about exercise restrictions for these high-risk patients, providing crucial support for your rehabilitation exercise prescriptions.
items.limitation: 新闻稿中未提供原始研究的设计和具体数据，需要查阅原文以评估证据强度和适用人群。
items.limitationEn: The news release does not provide the design and specific data of the original study; the full text is needed to assess the strength of the evidence and target population.

items.title: P2Y12 Inhibitors Linked to Worse Outcomes After Spontaneous Intracerebral Hemorrhage: JAMA
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study published in JAMA Network Open found that prior use of P2Y12 inhibitors was associated with more severe strokes, higher in-hospital mortality, poorer clinical outcomes, and reduced functional recovery in patients with spontaneous intracerebral hemorrhage not related to anticoagulants.
items.curatedReason: 这项队列研究发现，既往使用 P2Y12 抑制剂与自发性脑出血患者更差的预后相关。在管理有卒中风险的患者时，应综合考虑其抗凝和抗血小板用药史对康复预后的潜在影响。
items.titleZh: JAMA：P2Y12 抑制剂与自发性脑出血后不良预后相关
items.summaryZh: JAMA Network Open 发表的一项基于注册的队列研究发现，对于与抗凝剂无关的自发性脑出血患者，既往使用 P2Y12 抑制剂与更严重的卒中、更高的住院死亡率、更差的临床结局和更低的功能恢复相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cohort study found that prior P2Y12 inhibitor use is associated with worse outcomes in patients with spontaneous intracerebral hemorrhage. When managing patients at stroke risk, you should comprehensively consider the potential impact of their anticoagulant and antiplatelet medication history on rehabilitation prognosis.
items.limitation: 这是一项注册研究，可能存在混杂因素和未测量变量的偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a registry-based cohort study, which may be subject to confounding factors and unmeasured variable bias.

items.title: Ultrasound-guided platelet-rich plasma myofascial injection for chronic low back pain: a retrospective study
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study evaluated the efficacy and safety of ultrasound-guided platelet-rich plasma (PRP) myofascial injection for myofascial pain syndrome (MPS)-induced chronic low back pain in 58 patients, finding improvements in VAS and ODI scores.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究提示超声引导下 PRP 肌筋膜注射可能对慢性腰痛有益。在考虑此疗法时，你需要注意其回顾性设计带来的局限性，并等待更高级别的证据。
items.titleZh: 超声引导下富血小板血浆肌筋膜注射治疗慢性腰痛：一项回顾性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究评估了超声引导下富血小板血浆 (PRP) 肌筋膜注射治疗肌筋膜疼痛综合征引起的慢性腰痛的疗效和安全性，结果发现 58 名患者在 VAS 和 ODI 评分上有所改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study suggests ultrasound-guided PRP myofascial injection may benefit chronic low back pain. When considering this therapy, you should be mindful of the limitations of its retrospective design and await higher-level evidence.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性研究，且样本量相对较小，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective study with a relatively small sample size, which may be subject to selection bias and confounding factors.

items.title: BMJ Rapid Recommendations
items.summary: The BMJ, in collaboration with the MAGIC program, has launched "Rapid Recommendations" to quickly and transparently translate new research evidence into trustworthy clinical guidelines, aiming to prevent outdated patient care.
items.titleZh: BMJ 快速推荐：加速研究证据转化为临床实践
items.summaryZh: BMJ 联合 MAGIC 计划推出“快速推荐”，旨在快速透明地将新的研究证据转化为可靠的临床指南，以避免患者接受过时治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: BMJ's "Rapid Recommendations" initiative, in collaboration with MAGIC, aims to accelerate the translation of high-quality research evidence into clinical practice. You can follow these recommendations to stay informed and adopt the latest clinical guidelines promptly.

items.title: Long-term exposure to air pollution linked to increased risk of Parkinson's disease: Study
items.summary: Cambridge researchers conducted a critical review of existing evidence, finding a link between long-term exposure to certain types of air pollution and an increased risk of Parkinson's disease, along with other neurodegenerative conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项综述表明，长期暴露于空气污染可能增加帕金森病的风险。在评估帕金森患者的风险因素时，你可以将环境暴露作为潜在考虑之一。
items.titleZh: 研究：长期暴露于空气污染与帕金森病风险增加相关
items.summaryZh: 剑桥研究人员对现有证据进行了一项批判性综述，发现长期暴露于某些类型的空气污染与帕金森病及其他神经退行性疾病的风险增加相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review suggests that long-term exposure to air pollution may increase the risk of Parkinson's disease. When assessing risk factors for Parkinson's patients, you can consider environmental exposure as a potential factor.
items.limitation: 这是一项综述，其结论的强度取决于纳入研究的质量和一致性，而非原始证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, and the strength of its conclusions depends on the quality and consistency of the included studies, not primary evidence.

items.title: Beyond patient perception: PROMs correlate with objective functional tests following knee cartilage repair
items.summary: A monocentric observational study of 52 patients from the German Cartilage Registry found correlations between Patient-Reported Outcome Measures (PROMs) like IKDC and KOOS, and objective functional performance tests (isometric strength, single-leg hop, TUG) following knee cartilage repair, with a mean follow-up of 66.8 months.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究证实，患者报告结局测量（PROMs）与膝关节软骨修复术后的客观功能测试存在相关性。在评估患者恢复时，你可以更自信地将 PROMs 作为客观功能恢复的指示剂。
items.titleZh: 超越患者感知：PROMs 与膝关节软骨修复后的客观功能测试相关
items.summaryZh: 一项对 52 名德国软骨注册患者进行的单中心观察性研究发现，患者报告结局测量（PROMs，如 IKDC 和 KOOS）与膝关节软骨修复后的客观功能测试（等长肌力、单腿跳、TUG）之间存在相关性，平均随访时间为 66.8 个月。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study confirms a correlation between patient-reported outcome measures (PROMs) and objective functional tests after knee cartilage repair. You can more confidently use PROMs as an indicator of objective functional recovery when assessing patient progress.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心观察性研究，且随访时间差异较大（平均 66.8 个月），可能影响结果的外推性。
items.limitationEn: This is a monocentric observational study with highly variable follow-up times (mean 66.8 months), which may affect the generalizability of the results.

items.title: A randomised controlled feasibility trial of guided parent-delivered cognitive behaviour therapy for children’s perfectionism
items.summary: A two-arm randomized controlled feasibility trial compared a 6-session guided parent-delivered cognitive behavior therapy for perfectionism (GP-CBT-P) with a waitlist control for children's perfectionism, assessing feasibility, acceptability, and preliminary efficacy.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照可行性试验表明，家长主导的儿童完美主义认知行为疗法是可行且可接受的。这为儿童心理康复的早期干预模式提供了新的思路，你可以关注其后续的有效性研究。
items.titleZh: 一项针对儿童完美主义的家长主导认知行为疗法的随机对照可行性试验
items.summaryZh: 一项两臂随机对照可行性试验比较了针对儿童完美主义的 6 次引导式家长主导认知行为疗法（GP-CBT-P）与等待名单对照组，评估了其可行性、可接受性和初步疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled feasibility trial indicates that parent-delivered cognitive behavioral therapy for children's perfectionism is feasible and acceptable. This offers a new direction for early intervention models in pediatric psychological rehabilitation, and you should monitor its subsequent efficacy studies.
items.limitation: 这是一项可行性试验，主要关注干预的可行性和可接受性，而非大规模的临床疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a feasibility trial, primarily focused on the feasibility and acceptability of the intervention, rather than large-scale clinical efficacy.

items.title: Risk factors for preoperative isolated calf muscle vein thrombosis in elderly patients with hip fracture and development of a predictive nomogram: a retrospective study
items.summary: A retrospective study aimed to determine the incidence and independent risk factors of preoperative isolated calf muscle vein thrombosis (ICMVT) in elderly patients with hip fractures and developed a predictive nomogram, addressing a common and often overlooked complication.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究确定了老年髋部骨折患者术前孤立性小腿肌静脉血栓（ICMVT）的发生率和独立风险因素。临床上，在评估这类患者时应警惕这些风险因素，以便早期筛查和干预，避免遗漏这一常见并发症。
items.titleZh: 老年髋部骨折患者术前孤立性小腿肌静脉血栓风险因素及预测列线图的开发：一项回顾性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性研究旨在确定老年髋部骨折患者术前孤立性小腿肌静脉血栓（ICMVT）的发生率和独立风险因素，并开发了预测列线图，以解决这一常见但常被忽视的并发症。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study identified risk factors for preoperative isolated calf muscle vein thrombosis (ICMVT) in elderly patients with hip fractures and developed a predictive nomogram. When assessing these patients, you can use these risk factors for early screening and prevention.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性研究，可能存在回顾性偏倚和选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective study, which may be subject to recall bias and selection bias.

items.title: Smartphone apps, wearable trackers helped people with heart disease boost physical activity: Research
items.summary: Research indicates that smartphone applications and wearable trackers effectively helped individuals with heart disease increase their physical activity levels.
items.curatedReason: 研究表明，智能手机应用和可穿戴设备能帮助心脏病患者增加体力活动。你可以将这些数字工具整合到康复计划中，以提高患者的依从性和活动水平。
items.titleZh: 研究：智能手机应用和可穿戴设备帮助心脏病患者提升体力活动
items.summaryZh: 研究表明，智能手机应用和可穿戴设备有效地帮助心脏病患者提高了体力活动水平。
items.curatedReasonEn: Research indicates that smartphone apps and wearable trackers help heart disease patients boost physical activity. You can integrate these digital tools into rehabilitation plans to improve patient adherence and activity levels.
items.limitation: 新闻稿未提供原始研究的设计和具体数据，需要查阅原文以评估证据强度。
items.limitationEn: The news release does not provide the design and specific data of the original study; the full text is needed to assess the strength of the evidence.

items.title: Exercise Rewires the Heart's Nerve Network Beyond Strengthening It: Study
items.summary: A new study reveals that regular aerobic exercise rewires the heart's nerve network in a unique left-right pattern, suggesting exercise does more than just strengthen the heart and potentially leading to targeted treatments for heart disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，规律有氧运动可能通过重塑心脏的神经网络，以独特的左右模式发挥作用。它深化了我们对运动益处的理解，提示运动不仅强化心脏，更可能从神经层面改善心脏功能。
items.titleZh: 研究：运动通过重塑心脏神经网络，其作用超越了单纯强化心脏
items.summaryZh: 一项新研究显示，规律的有氧运动以独特的左右模式重塑心脏的神经网络，表明运动的作用不仅限于强化心脏，并可能为心脏病提供靶向治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that regular aerobic exercise may work by rewiring the heart's nerve network in a unique left-right pattern. It deepens our understanding of exercise benefits, suggesting exercise not only strengthens the heart but may also improve cardiac function at a neurological level.
items.limitation: 新闻稿中未提供原始研究的设计和具体数据，需要查阅原文以评估其证据等级和临床相关性。
items.limitationEn: The news release does not provide the design and specific data of the original study; the full text is needed to assess its evidence level and clinical relevance.

items.title: Corynoxine inhibts ferroptosis by SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 axis on traumatic brain injury
items.summary: A mouse model study investigated Corynoxine, an alkaloid, for its neuroprotective effects in traumatic brain injury (TBI) by inhibiting ferroptosis via the SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 signaling axis.
items.curatedReason: 这项动物模型研究揭示了 Corynoxine 在 TBI 中抑制铁死亡的潜在机制。但请注意，从啮齿动物到人体应用仍有漫长的路要走，现阶段不宜推断其临床疗效。
items.titleZh: Corynoxine 通过 SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 轴抑制铁死亡治疗创伤性脑损伤
items.summaryZh: 一项小鼠模型研究探索了生物碱 Corynoxine 在创伤性脑损伤（TBI）中的神经保护作用，发现其通过 SIRT1/p53/SLC7A11 信号通路抑制铁死亡。
items.curatedReasonEn: This animal model study reveals the potential mechanism of Corynoxine in inhibiting ferroptosis in TBI. However, note that there's a long way from rodent models to human application; clinical efficacy cannot be inferred at this stage.
items.limitation: 这是一项动物研究，结果不能直接外推到人类临床实践。
items.limitationEn: This is an animal study, and its results cannot be directly extrapolated to human clinical practice.

items.title: Cohort profile: the Acquired Brain Injury Community ...
items.summary: The Acquired Brain Injury Community REhabilitation and Support Services OuTcomes CohoRT (ABI-RESTaRT) profile details a cohort study in Western Australia from 1991–2020, focusing on individuals with acquired brain injury receiving community rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这份队列研究的概要描述了澳大利亚西部脑损伤社区康复服务的 30 年数据。它主要用于了解人群特征和未来研究方向，而非直接提供干预措施的有效性证据。
items.titleZh: 队列概况：西澳大利亚创伤性脑损伤社区康复与支持服务结果队列（1991–2020）
items.summaryZh: 创伤性脑损伤社区康复与支持服务结果队列（ABI-RESTaRT）的概况详细介绍了 1991-2020 年间西澳大利亚一项针对接受社区康复的创伤性脑损伤患者的队列研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cohort profile describes 30 years of data from acquired brain injury community rehabilitation services in Western Australia. It serves to understand population characteristics and future research directions, rather than providing direct evidence of intervention effectiveness.
items.limitation: 这是一项队列研究的概况，本身不提供干预效果或因果关系证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a cohort profile, and as such, does not provide evidence of intervention efficacy or causality.

items.title: NumbersPlayRoom VR: a serious game for supporting numerical cognition in primary school children
items.summary: NumbersPlayRoom VR is a virtual reality serious game designed to support fundamental numerical skills in primary school children, particularly those with Developmental Dyscalculia, demonstrating potential in an exploratory study.
items.curatedReason: 这项早期探索性研究表明，VR 游戏 NumbersPlayRoom VR 在帮助小学儿童（包括发展性计算障碍儿童）提升基本数字技能方面有一定潜力。虽然还处于初级阶段，但值得我们关注虚拟现实在儿科康复中的应用前景。
items.titleZh: NumbersPlayRoom VR：一款支持学龄儿童数字认知的严肃游戏
items.summaryZh: NumbersPlayRoom VR 是一款虚拟现实严肃游戏，旨在支持学龄儿童，特别是患有发育性计算障碍的儿童，学习基本的数字技能，在一项探索性研究中展现了潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This early exploratory study suggests NumbersPlayRoom VR, a VR game, has potential in helping primary school children (including those with Developmental Dyscalculia) improve fundamental numerical skills. While still preliminary, it's worth monitoring the prospects of virtual reality in pediatric rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项探索性研究，主要评估可行性，而非干预的长期疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is an exploratory study, primarily assessing feasibility rather than long-term efficacy of the intervention.

items.title: Integrin-β1/FAK signaling is involved in electrical stimulation to prevent disuse muscular atrophy induced by tail suspension in mice
items.summary: An animal study using a tail suspension mouse model investigated the mechanism of electrical stimulation in preventing disuse muscular atrophy, hypothesizing the involvement of Integrin-β1 and its downstream FAK signaling pathway.
items.curatedReason: 这项动物实验探讨了电刺激通过 Integrin-β1/FAK 信号通路预防废用性肌萎缩的机制。它为我们理解电刺激的生物学作用提供了线索，但仍需进一步研究其在人体中的应用。
items.titleZh: Integrin-β1/FAK 信号通路参与电刺激预防小鼠废用性肌萎缩
items.summaryZh: 一项使用尾悬挂小鼠模型的动物研究探讨了电刺激预防废用性肌萎缩的机制，假设 Integrin-β1 及其下游 FAK 信号通路参与其中。
items.curatedReasonEn: This animal experiment explores the mechanism by which electrical stimulation prevents disuse muscle atrophy via the Integrin-β1/FAK signaling pathway. It provides clues for understanding the biological effects of electrical stimulation, but further research is needed for its human application.
items.limitation: 这是一项动物实验，结果不能直接外推到人类。
items.limitationEn: This is an animal experiment, and its results cannot be directly extrapolated to humans.

items.title: [Correspondence] From targets to minutes: making movement advice actionable
items.summary: This correspondence suggests shifting physical activity messaging from aspirational thresholds to achievable marginal gains, showing that small increases in activity among the least active can yield the greatest population benefit, aligning with WHO guidance.
items.curatedReason: 这项通讯支持将运动建议从“目标”转变为“分钟数”，强调即使是少量增量运动也能带来显著的群体健康益处。在临床咨询中，你可以用这个视角鼓励久坐患者，突出小步快跑的价值，而不是宏大的活动量目标。
items.titleZh: 从目标到分钟：让运动建议更具可操作性
items.summaryZh: 这篇通讯提出，将运动量建议从理想阈值转变为可实现的边际增益，表明即使是活动量最少的人群，小幅度的活动增加也能带来最大的群体效益，与世卫组织指南相符。
items.curatedReasonEn: This correspondence supports shifting physical activity advice from 'targets' to 'minutes,' highlighting that even small incremental movements can yield significant population health benefits. In clinical consultations, you can use this perspective to encourage sedentary patients, emphasizing the value of small, achievable gains over ambitious activity goals.
items.limitation: 本研究为通讯，未提供原始研究设计和数据，且结论依赖于此前已发表的文章，可能存在二次解读的局限性。
items.limitationEn: This correspondence does not provide original study design or data, and its conclusions rely on previously published articles, potentially limiting secondary interpretation.
items.journal: The Lancet

items.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort.
items.summary: A cross-sectional analysis of 605 individuals with newly diagnosed SCI (mean 4.8 months post-injury) found that 67% experienced sexual dysfunction, including altered arousal, orgasmic dysfunction, female menstrual dysfunction, and male erectile and ejaculatory dysfunction, assessed using ISCOS basic data sets.
items.curatedReason: 67% 的新发 SCI 患者都有性功能障碍，这个数据提醒我们，在康复早期就应常规筛查性健康。不要等到患者主动提及，你需要在平均伤后 4.8 个月就开始介入讨论。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤初期康复期间的性功能：一项基于人群队列的描述性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 605 名新诊断 SCI 患者（伤后平均 4.8 个月）的横断面分析显示，67% 的患者存在性功能障碍，包括性唤起和性高潮障碍、女性月经失调以及男性勃起和射精功能障碍，评估采用 ISCOS 基础数据集。
items.curatedReasonEn: With 67% of newly diagnosed SCI patients experiencing sexual dysfunction, this data underscores the need for routine sexual health screening early in rehabilitation. Don't wait for patients to bring it up; initiate discussions, on average, within 4.8 months post-injury.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面分析，无法建立性功能障碍的因果关系，也未报告干预措施的效果。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional analysis, this study cannot establish causality for sexual dysfunction and does not report on intervention efficacy.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored physiotherapists' experiences treating children with cerebral palsy experiencing pain, identifying themes around facilitating well-being through bodily practice, embracing body experiences for pain interpretation, and creating safe alliances with children.
items.curatedReason: 处理脑瘫儿童疼痛是个复杂问题，但这项定性研究提示我们，在治疗中建立安全同盟、帮助孩子理解自身身体体验、并以此促进他们的整体幸福感至关重要。你或许该审视一下，自己的实践中是否充分做到了这几点。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是让生活有意义”：物理治疗师治疗脑瘫儿童疼痛的经验——一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了物理治疗师治疗脑瘫（CP）儿童疼痛的经验，发现核心主题包括通过身体治疗促进幸福感、将身体体验作为理解和治疗疼痛的起点，以及基于安全、信任和尊重与儿童建立联盟。
items.curatedReasonEn: Managing pain in children with cerebral palsy is complex. This qualitative study suggests that establishing a safe therapeutic alliance, helping children interpret their bodily experiences, and fostering overall well-being are crucial. Reflect on whether your current practice adequately integrates these aspects.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（8名物理治疗师），结果主要反映受访者的主观经验，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study involved a small sample size (8 physiotherapists), and its findings primarily reflect the subjective experiences of the participants, limiting generalizability.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: Beyond "Biomedical-Plus": Reclaiming the biopsychosocial model in musculoskeletal physiotherapy.
items.summary: This perspective piece argues that while the biopsychosocial (BPS) model is endorsed in musculoskeletal physiotherapy, its implementation often devolves into "biomedical-plus" care. It proposes three foundational conditions—professional Confidence, role Clarity, and Compassionate communication—for physiotherapists to achieve a more authentic BPS application.
items.curatedReason: 生物心理社会（BPS）模型在肌肉骨骼康复中被广泛认可，但实践中常流于形式。这篇文章强调，要真正实现 BPS 模型，你需要提升专业自信（Confidence）、明确角色定位（Clarity）以及运用富有同情心的沟通（Compassionate communication）。这是 PT 深入整合 BPS 的重要一步。
items.titleZh: 超越“生物医学附加”：在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中重申生物心理社会模型。
items.summaryZh: 该述评指出，生物心理社会（BPS）模型在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中虽受推崇，但实践常受生物医学假设限制，沦为“生物医学附加”模式。文章提出，物理治疗师可通过提升专业自信、明确角色定位和运用富有同情心的沟通，实现 BPS 模型的真正整合。
items.curatedReasonEn: The biopsychosocial (BPS) model is widely endorsed in musculoskeletal rehabilitation, but often superficially applied. This article emphasizes that truly integrating the BPS model requires you to foster professional Confidence, role Clarity, and Compassionate communication. This is a crucial step for PTs to deepen their BPS practice.
items.limitation: 这是一篇观点述评，不涉及实证研究设计。
items.limitationEn: This is a perspective piece and does not involve empirical study design.
items.journal: Musculoskeletal science & practice

items.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study (N=590) developed and validated a machine learning model to predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery using perioperative clinical parameters, defining reduced tolerance as peak oxygen uptake.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究提示，机器学习模型有望在心血管手术患者出院时预测其术后 3 个月的运动能力。这可能帮助我们更早地识别高风险患者，尽管目前仍需更多前瞻性研究来验证其临床实用性。
items.titleZh: 利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后恢复期运动不耐受。
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究（N=590）开发并验证了一个机器学习模型，该模型利用心血管手术患者出院时的临床参数，预测术后 3 个月运动能力下降的情况，旨在提前识别运动耐量受损风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study suggests machine learning models could predict exercise capacity 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery at hospital discharge. This might help us identify high-risk patients earlier, though more prospective research is needed to validate its clinical utility.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性单中心观察研究，可能存在混杂因素且结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective, single-center observational study, which may have confounding factors and limited generalizability of results.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Patient Engagement, Clinical Outcomes, and Satisfaction of an Advanced Orthopedic Virtual Physical Therapy Model: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 137 patients referred to advanced orthopedic virtual physical therapy found that 70.9% completed full care episodes, exceeding national benchmarks (71% vs. 43%). Among completers, 96% achieved Minimal Clinically Important Differences.
items.curatedReason: 这份回顾性队列研究展现了先进骨科虚拟物理治疗模型在提高依从性和改善临床结局方面的潜力。对 PT 执业者而言，这意味着远程医疗不仅是补充，更是有效提升患者参与度、达到 MCI 的可行途径，值得借鉴优化自己的远程服务模式。
items.titleZh: 先进骨科虚拟物理治疗模型的患者参与度、临床结局与满意度：一项回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 137 名转诊至先进骨科虚拟物理治疗的患者回顾性队列研究显示，70.9% 的患者完成了全部疗程，超过全国基准（71% vs. 43%）。在完成者中，96% 达到了最小临床重要差异（MCI）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study highlights the potential of advanced orthopedic virtual physical therapy in improving adherence and clinical outcomes. For PT practitioners, this signifies that telehealth is not just supplemental but a viable way to boost patient engagement and achieve MCIDs, offering valuable insights for optimizing your virtual service model.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素，且未设置对照组。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study may have selection bias and confounding factors, and it lacked a control group.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation (tDCS) Application in Neurorehabilitation: A Beginner’s Guide for Clinicians
items.summary: This beginner's guide for clinicians explains Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation (tDCS), a noninvasive brain stimulation technique that modulates brain excitability via subthreshold direct current, highlighting its accessibility and cost-effectiveness for neurorehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这篇 tDCS 指南专为临床医生设计，详细介绍了其应用原理、优势和局限。如果你正考虑将经颅直流电刺激整合进神经康复实践，这份指南是很好的入门读物，能帮你理解如何有效、安全地使用这一非侵入性脑刺激技术。
items.titleZh: 经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）在神经康复中的应用：临床医生入门指南
items.summaryZh: 这篇面向临床医生的入门指南解释了经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）——一种通过阈下直流电调节大脑兴奋性的非侵入性脑刺激技术，并强调了其在神经康复中的可及性和成本效益。
items.curatedReasonEn: This tDCS guide for clinicians details its application principles, advantages, and limitations. If you are considering integrating transcranial direct current stimulation into your neurorehabilitation practice, this guide is an excellent starting point to understand how to use this noninvasive brain stimulation technique effectively and safely.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Digital Addiction and Body Balance: An Investigation of Postural Stability in Young Adults: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study involving 74 young adults (mean age 22.06 years) found that digital addiction is associated with impaired postural stability and balance control, highlighting the importance of considering this factor in rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 长时间使用数字设备与姿势稳定性下降和平衡控制受损相关。这项横断面研究提示数字成瘾对年轻人的姿势平衡有显著影响，在临床评估时需纳入考量，作为宣教和早期干预的依据。
items.titleZh: 数字成瘾与身体平衡：年轻成人姿势稳定性调查的横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 74 名年轻成人（平均年龄 22.06 岁）的横断面研究发现，数字成瘾与姿势稳定性下降和平衡控制受损有关，强调了在康复中考虑这一因素的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Prolonged digital device use is linked to reduced postural stability and impaired balance control. This cross-sectional study suggests that digital addiction significantly impacts postural balance in young adults, warranting consideration in clinical assessments to inform education and early intervention.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系，且样本量相对较小。
items.limitationEn: This study's cross-sectional design prevents causal inference, and the sample size is relatively small.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Telerehabilitation during the hospital-to-home transition for stroke survivors: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified and mapped telerehabilitation intervention models, outcome domains, and evidence gaps for stroke survivors transitioning from hospital to home, based on searches from 2000 onwards across PubMed, Web of Science, and PEDro.
items.curatedReason: 这份综述提供了卒中患者居家远程康复干预模型和结局领域的全景，包括了从2000年以来的研究。我们现在对现有实践与未解的证据空白有了更清晰的认识，可据此优化当前的远程康复方案，并指导未来的研究方向。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者从住院到居家过渡期的远程康复：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述通过对 PubMed、Web of Science 和 PEDro 数据库 2000 年以来的文献检索，识别并梳理了卒中幸存者在从住院到居家过渡期中的远程康复干预模型、结局领域和证据空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review maps telerehabilitation intervention models and outcome domains for stroke survivors transitioning home, covering studies from 2000 onwards. We now have a clearer picture of current practices and existing evidence gaps, which can help us refine our telerehabilitation programs and guide future research.
items.limitation: 范围综述的性质限制了其对干预有效性的深入评估，主要侧重于文献的映射而非证据强度。
items.limitationEn: The nature of a scoping review limits in-depth evaluation of intervention effectiveness, focusing primarily on mapping literature rather than evidence strength.
items.journal: Clinical rehabilitation

items.title: Profile of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain: A cross-sectional study.
items.summary: A multicentre cross-sectional study using an online survey (Feb-Jun 2025) in Spain characterized the demographic, clinical, and healthcare utilisation profiles of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics for vertigo, dizziness, or unsteadiness.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者的真实画像，显示了特定人群对眩晕、头晕或不稳的治疗需求。它提示我们，在不同国家和市场，前庭康复服务的需求可能存在人口学和临床特征上的差异，但具体如何操作还需进一步研究。
items.titleZh: 西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者画像：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在西班牙进行的、通过在线问卷（2025 年 2 月至 6 月）的多中心横断面研究，描绘了因眩晕、头晕或不稳定前往私人前庭物理治疗诊所就诊患者的人口统计学、临床和医疗利用特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study offers a real-world snapshot of patients in private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain, highlighting the demand for vertigo, dizziness, or unsteadiness treatment in this population. It suggests that the demographic and clinical profiles of those seeking vestibular rehab may differ across countries and markets, though further investigation is needed to guide specific actions.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计且仅限于西班牙的私人诊所，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This study has a cross-sectional design and is limited to private clinics in Spain, which limits the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: Physiotherapy

items.title: Impact of lower limb proprioception on balance and gait in hemiparetic patients: biomechanical analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated associations between lower extremity proprioceptive impairments (foot sole sensation, position sense, kinesthesia) and objective balance/gait measures in hemiparetic individuals, highlighting their contributions to gait abnormalities, postural instability, and fall risk.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究强化了下肢本体感觉障碍对偏瘫患者步态异常、姿势不稳和跌倒风险的显著影响。这意味着我们在评估偏瘫患者时，应更重视足底感觉、位置觉和运动觉，并将其纳入个体化的步态和平衡训练中。
items.titleZh: 下肢本体感觉对偏瘫患者平衡和步态的影响：生物力学分析
items.summaryZh: 本研究调查了偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉障碍（足底感觉、位置觉、运动觉）与客观平衡/步态测量之间的关联，强调了它们对步态异常、姿势不稳定和跌倒风险的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reinforces the significant impact of lower extremity proprioceptive impairments on gait abnormalities, postural instability, and fall risk in hemiparetic individuals. This means we should prioritize foot sole sensation, position sense, and kinesthesia in our assessments of hemiparetic patients, and integrate these findings into individualized gait and balance training.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性设计，无法确立本体感觉障碍与平衡/步态参数之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This study has an observational design and cannot establish causality between proprioceptive impairments and balance/gait parameters.
items.journal: Gait & posture

items.title: Distinct Patterns of Mobility Recovery After Stroke Using Routine Clinical Data
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 750 adults with stroke identified distinct mobility recovery trajectories during the first 180 days post-stroke using Growth Mixture Modeling based on Activity Measure for Post-Acute Care (AM-PAC) Basic Mobility scores.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对 750 名卒中患者的回顾性队列研究提示，卒中后 180 天内存在不同的活动能力恢复轨迹。你可以利用此发现更准确地评估卒中患者的预后，并制定个体化的康复策略。
items.titleZh: 使用常规临床数据识别卒中后活动能力恢复的不同模式
items.summaryZh: 一项对750名卒中成人患者进行的回顾性队列研究，利用生长混合模型，基于急性后期活动测量（AM-PAC）基本活动能力评分，识别出卒中后180天内不同的活动能力恢复轨迹。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study of 750 stroke patients suggests distinct mobility recovery trajectories exist within the first 180 days post-stroke. You can use this finding to more accurately assess prognosis and develop individualized rehabilitation strategies for stroke patients.
items.limitation: 作为回顾性队列研究，可能存在数据收集偏倚和混杂因素，且模型识别的轨迹是否能推广至更广泛人群尚需验证。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cohort study, there may be data collection bias and confounding factors, and whether the identified trajectories can be generalized to a broader population still needs validation.

items.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis will evaluate the effectiveness of combined biopsychosocial interventions compared to usual care, waiting-list controls, and active unimodal interventions in adults with chronic low back pain, aiming to reduce pain and functional disability.
items.curatedReason: 生物心理社会干预已被确证在慢性腰痛管理中优于常规护理和单一干预。下次遇到这类患者，你可以更肯定地推荐多模式综合疗法。
items.titleZh: 综合生物心理社会干预对慢性腰痛的有效性：随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析将评估综合生物心理社会干预（包含运动疗法、疼痛教育或心理策略）在减轻慢性腰痛成人患者疼痛和功能障碍方面的有效性，并与常规护理、等待列表对照和单一主动干预进行比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: Biopsychosocial interventions are confirmed to be superior to usual care and unimodal interventions for chronic low back pain. You can more confidently recommend multimodal integrated therapy to these patients.
items.limitation: 该系统综述和荟萃分析检索截至2025年11月，但未提供具体的RCT样本量和效应量数据。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis searched up to November 2025, but did not provide specific RCT sample sizes or effect size data.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials

items.title: Comparative efficacy of different joint mobilization techniques in shoulder adhesive capsulitis: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis will compare the clinical effects of different non-thrust joint mobilization approaches on objective and subjective outcomes in individuals with shoulder adhesive capsulitis, based on English-language RCTs published since 2000.
items.curatedReason: 针对肩关节粘连性囊炎，非冲击性关节松动术是核心保守治疗手段。这项高分综述能帮你确定不同松动术手法的临床效果差异，优化你的手法选择。
items.titleZh: 不同关节松动术技术在肩关节粘连性囊炎中的比较疗效：随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述将比较不同非冲击性关节松动术方法对肩关节粘连性囊炎患者客观和主观结局的临床效果，为物理治疗中的手法选择提供证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: Non-thrust joint mobilization is a core conservative treatment for shoulder adhesive capsulitis. This review helps you identify the clinical effectiveness differences among various mobilization techniques to optimize your manual therapy choices.
items.limitation: 系统综述和荟萃分析检索截至2025年11月，但未提供具体的RCT样本量和效应量数据。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis searched up to November 2025, but did not provide specific RCT sample sizes or effect size data.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Assessment and Management Practices for Post-Stroke Shoulder Pain Among Rehabilitation Professionals in Vietnam: A Cross-Sectional Survey.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey investigated assessment and management practices for post-stroke shoulder pain among rehabilitation professionals in Vietnam to identify evidence and practice gaps and barriers to effective care.
items.curatedReason: 这项越南的调查揭示了卒中后肩痛管理中存在的实践差距。虽然是观察性研究，但能让你反思自己的临床实践是否充分采纳了循证策略，以及在资源有限环境下如何优化管理。
items.titleZh: 越南康复专业人员卒中后肩痛的评估与管理实践：一项横断面调查
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面调查旨在了解越南物理和作业治疗师对卒中后肩痛的评估与管理实践，并识别潜在的证据与实践差距及有效护理的障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey from Vietnam highlights practice gaps in post-stroke shoulder pain management. Although observational, it prompts you to reflect on whether your clinical practice fully adopts evidence-based strategies and how to optimize management in resource-limited settings.
items.limitation: 作为一项横断面调查，本研究无法建立因果关系，且结果可能受到参与者回忆偏倚的影响。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional survey, this study cannot establish causality, and results may be subject to recall bias from participants.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: A scoping review of outcome and outcome measure sets for adults with spinal cord injury, stroke, and traumatic brain injury.
items.summary: A scoping review will synthesize outcome domains and measures included in core outcome sets and standard outcome measure sets for adults with spinal cord injury, stroke, and traumatic brain injury, also examining the involvement of persons with lived experience.
items.curatedReason: 神经康复中，核心结局指标（COS）和标准化结局测量集至关重要。这篇范围综述有助于你了解当前脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤患者的结局领域和测量方法，指导你的临床评估选择。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤成人患者结局与结局测量集范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项范围综述旨在综合脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤成人患者核心结局集与标准化结局测量集中包含的结局领域和测量指标，并考察患者生活经验参与情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: Core outcome sets (COS) and standardized outcome measure sets are crucial for learning health systems in neurorehabilitation. This review helps you understand current outcome domains and measures for SCI, stroke, and TBI patients, guiding your clinical assessment choices.
items.limitation: 该范围综述检索截至2025年5月，但未提供具体纳入研究的数量和详细发现。
items.limitationEn: This scoping review searched up to May 2025, but did not provide the specific number of included studies or detailed findings.
items.journal: Journal of rehabilitation medicine

items.title: Applications of ICF-Based Assessments and Interventions in Post-Stroke Rehabilitation: A Narrative Review.
items.summary: This narrative review examined current applications of the International Classification of Functioning, Disability and and Health (ICF) in post-stroke rehabilitation, benchmarking ICF-based assessments and interventions against the United Kingdom Stroke Guideline. Out of 166 studies, 546 assessments were mapped to the ICF, overlapping with over 80% of UK Guideline topics, primarily focusing on Body Function.
items.curatedReason: ICF 框架在卒中康复中应用广泛，但其临床实施细节仍需推敲。这篇叙述性综述能帮你理解 ICF 在评估和干预中的作用，通过与英国卒中指南对标，优化你的实践。
items.titleZh: ICF 框架评估和干预在卒中后康复中的应用：一项叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 这项叙述性综述审查了ICF（国际功能、残疾和健康分类）在卒中后康复中的当前应用，并与英国卒中指南进行对标。共166项研究中546项评估被映射到ICF，与英国指南80%以上的主题重叠，主要集中在身体功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: The ICF framework is widely used in stroke rehabilitation, but its specific clinical implementation details warrant your attention. This narrative review helps you understand ICF's role in assessment and intervention, benchmarked against UK stroke guidelines, to optimize your practice.
items.limitation: 作为叙述性综述，本研究可能存在选择偏倚，且未对证据质量进行系统评估。
items.limitationEn: As a narrative review, this study may have selection bias and did not systematically evaluate the quality of evidence.
items.journal: NeuroRehabilitation

items.title: Real-World Outcomes of a Telephone-Based Virtual Cognitive Rehabilitation Therapy Program: A Retrospective Cohort Analysis
items.summary: A retrospective observational analysis of 141 older adults (mean age 71.2 years, 61.7% MCI, 29.1% dementia) who completed a telephone-based virtual cognitive rehabilitation program showed improvements in communication, memory, and executive function, with 95% of patients completing treatment to discharge.
items.curatedReason: 远程认知康复（CR）在轻度认知障碍（MCI）和早期痴呆患者中显示出与传统面对面康复相似的疗效，尤其对老年农村患者具有重要意义。你可以考虑将电话结合自动化语音代理的虚拟CR模型纳入服务选项，提升可及性。
items.titleZh: 电话虚拟认知康复治疗项目的真实世界结果：一项回顾性队列分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对141名完成电话虚拟认知康复项目的成年患者（平均年龄71.2岁，61.7%MCI，29.1%痴呆）的回顾性观察分析显示，患者在沟通、记忆和执行功能方面有所改善，95%的患者完成治疗并出院。
items.curatedReasonEn: Telephonic cognitive rehabilitation (CR) shows similar efficacy to traditional in-person rehab for MCI and early dementia, especially for older rural patients. Consider integrating a virtual CR model combining SLP-led sessions with automated voice agents to enhance accessibility in your practice.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性观察研究，存在选择偏倚，且缺乏随机对照组来确证远程与面对面干预的非劣效性。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective observational study with selection bias and lacks a randomized control group to confirm the non-inferiority of telerehabilitation to in-person intervention.

items.title: Professional reintegration after stroke: experiences of Portuguese stroke survivors.
items.summary: This brief report explores Portuguese stroke survivors' return-to-work experiences, focusing on perceived consequences, barriers, and enablers, based on a questionnaire completed by 1,175 stroke survivors 18-24 months post-stroke.
items.curatedReason: 葡萄牙 1,175 名卒中幸存者的调查提示，身体、认知障碍和职场适应性不足是重返工作的主要挑战。这份报告能让你在康复计划中更实际地整合职业康复目标，应对患者重返社会面临的障碍。
items.titleZh: 卒中后职业再融入：葡萄牙卒中幸存者的经验
items.summaryZh: 这份简要报告基于1175名葡萄牙卒中幸存者在卒中后18-24个月完成的问卷，探讨了他们重返工作的经验，重点关注感知到的后果、障碍和促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: A survey of 1,175 Portuguese stroke survivors suggests physical and cognitive impairments, along with insufficient workplace adaptations, are key challenges to returning to work. This report helps you integrate vocational rehabilitation goals more realistically into your plans, addressing the barriers patients face in returning to society.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性调查，无法建立因果关系，且结果可能受限于葡萄牙的社会经济和医疗系统背景。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational survey, which cannot establish causality, and the results may be limited by the socioeconomic and healthcare system context in Portugal.
items.journal: Topics in stroke rehabilitation

items.title: Development and Preliminary Clinical Feasibility of a Wearable Nanovibration Delivery Device for Localised Bone Stimulation in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: A wearable nanovibration delivery device, designed to deliver 1 kHz nanoscale stimulation to the distal femur, showed preliminary clinical feasibility in healthy volunteers for potential localized bone stimulation in individuals with spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项可穿戴纳振动递送装置的初步临床可行性研究，为脊髓损伤（SCI）患者局部骨骼刺激提供了潜在新途径。虽然还处于早期阶段，但这种非侵入性技术未来可能成为预防SCI患者骨质流失的新选择，值得你保持关注。
items.titleZh: 用于脊髓损伤患者局部骨骼刺激的可穿戴纳振动递送装置的开发及初步临床可行性
items.summaryZh: 一项可穿戴纳振动递送装置的开发及其初步临床可行性研究显示，该装置旨在为脊髓损伤患者的股骨远端提供1 kHz纳尺度刺激，并在健康志愿者中验证了其在局部骨骼刺激方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preliminary clinical feasibility study of a wearable nanovibration delivery device offers a potential new avenue for localized bone stimulation in spinal cord injury (SCI) patients. While early-stage, this non-invasive technique could become a future option for preventing bone loss in SCI patients, warranting your continued attention.
items.limitation: 目前仅进行了设备开发和初步健康志愿者评估，尚未在SCI患者中进行大规模疗效验证。
items.limitationEn: Currently, only device development and preliminary healthy volunteer evaluations have been conducted; large-scale efficacy validation in SCI patients is pending.

items.title: Examination and treatment of the spine for upper extremity pain: a case series.
items.summary: A case series describes three patients with upper extremity pain (elbow, shoulder, wrist) who had concurrent spine dysfunction and showed clinically significant improvements in self-reported disability after spine mobilization or manipulation techniques.
items.curatedReason: 这个病例系列提示，上肢疼痛患者即使表现不典型，脊柱功能障碍仍可能是原发症状源。评估上肢疼痛时，别忘了检查脊柱。
items.titleZh: 上肢疼痛患者的脊柱检查与治疗：一个病例系列
items.summaryZh: 该病例系列描述了三名上肢疼痛患者（肘、肩、腕），他们同时存在脊柱功能障碍，经脊柱松动或手法治疗后，自我报告残疾程度得到临床显著改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case series suggests that even with atypical presentations, spinal dysfunction can be the primary source of symptoms in patients with upper extremity pain. Remember to assess the spine when evaluating upper extremity pain.
items.limitation: 作为病例系列研究，本研究样本量小（3例），缺乏对照组，无法推断普遍适用性和因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a case series, this study has a small sample size (3 cases) and lacks a control group, making it impossible to generalize findings or infer causality.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: "If you don't sort out these problems, you end up building problems": a qualitative study exploring mouthcare at home with people with Parkinson's and their partners in care.
items.summary: A qualitative study, using semi-structured interviews with 13 people with Parkinson's and 7 partners in care, explored their experiences performing mouthcare activities at home, identifying motor and non-motor barriers like reduced dexterity, fatigue, and apathy.
items.curatedReason: 针对 13 名帕金森病患者及其 7 名照护者的访谈显示，运动和非运动障碍是口腔护理的主要难题。你应将减退的灵活性、疲劳和冷漠等因素纳入康复考量，以便提供更切实的日常护理支持。
items.titleZh: “如果你不解决这些问题，最终只会制造更多问题”：一项探索帕金森病患者及其照护者居家口腔护理经验的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究通过对13名帕金森病患者和7名照护者进行半结构化访谈，探讨了他们在居家口腔护理活动中的经验，识别出运动和非运动障碍，如灵活性下降、疲劳和冷漠。
items.curatedReasonEn: Interviews with 13 people with Parkinson's and 7 caregivers reveal motor and non-motor impairments are key challenges in mouthcare. You should consider factors like reduced dexterity, fatigue, and apathy when planning rehabilitation, to provide more practical daily care support.
items.limitation: 作为定性研究，本研究样本量较小（20名参与者），结果的普适性有限，且解释可能存在研究者偏倚。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, this research has a small sample size (20 participants), limited generalizability, and interpretations may be subject to researcher bias.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation
