items.curatedReason: 这篇新闻报道表明，对于不稳定性踝关节骨折术后患者，早期负重可能加速康复。尽管是新闻报道，但这一方向与康复医学的趋势一致，未来可关注更严谨的证据。
items.titleZh: 早期负重可加速不稳定踝关节骨折术后恢复
items.summaryZh: 一项研究表明，对于不稳定性踝关节骨折术后患者，早期负重可以加快康复速度，从而改善患者预后。
items.curatedReasonEn: This news report suggests that early weight-bearing may accelerate recovery after unstable ankle fracture surgery. While a news piece, this aligns with rehabilitation trends; keep an eye out for more rigorous evidence.

items.title: The association between diabetes mellitus and low back pain: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis confirmed a significant association between diabetes mellitus and low back pain, highlighting the comorbid prevalence and longitudinal relationship between these two conditions in adult populations.
items.curatedReason: 糖尿病与腰痛之间存在明确关联。在评估和管理糖尿病患者的腰痛时，你应意识到这种共病关系，并考虑更综合的治疗策略，而非孤立处理。不要忽视对糖尿病患者的腰痛进行全面评估。
items.titleZh: 糖尿病与腰痛的关联：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析证实，糖尿病与腰痛之间存在显著关联，强调了这两种疾病在成年人群中的共病患病率和纵向关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: A clear association exists between diabetes and low back pain. When assessing and managing LBP in diabetic patients, you should be aware of this comorbidity and consider more integrated treatment strategies rather than isolated approaches. Do not overlook comprehensive LBP assessment in diabetic patients.
items.limitation: 尽管是系统综述，但纳入研究的异质性（如 LBP 诊断标准、糖尿病类型、随访时间）可能影响汇总结果的准确性。
items.limitationEn: Although a systematic review, heterogeneity among included studies (e.g., LBP diagnostic criteria, diabetes types, follow-up duration) might affect the accuracy of pooled results.

items.title: Effects of a 4-week neuromuscular balance training program on knee proprioception, functional performance, and landing errors in national-level female wrestlers: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A 4-week neuromuscular balance training program significantly improved knee proprioception, functional performance, and reduced landing errors in 22 national-level female wrestlers, suggesting a potential for lower extremity injury risk reduction.
items.curatedReason: 对于女子摔跤运动员，短期的神经肌肉平衡训练能有效提升膝关节本体感觉、功能表现并减少着陆错误。可在赛季前或训练周期中整合此类干预，以降低下肢损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 为期 4 周的神经肌肉平衡训练对国家级女子摔跤运动员膝关节本体感觉、功能表现和着陆错误的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项为期 4 周的神经肌肉平衡训练计划显著改善了 22 名国家级女子摔跤运动员的膝关节本体感觉、功能表现并减少了着陆错误，提示可能降低下肢损伤风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: For female wrestlers, short-term neuromuscular balance training effectively improves knee proprioception, functional performance, and reduces landing errors. Consider integrating such interventions pre-season or during training cycles to mitigate lower extremity injury risk.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（22名），可能限制结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: The study's small sample size (22 participants) may limit the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: Acute effects of aerobic versus combined aerobic and cervical-upper extremity resistance exercise on pressure pain threshold, pain perception, and fatigue in workers exposed to high ergonomic risk with chronic non-specific neck pain: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This RCT found that combined aerobic and cervical-upper extremity resistance exercise had superior acute effects on pressure pain threshold (PPT), pain perception, and fatigue compared to aerobic exercise alone in workers with chronic non-specific neck pain.
items.curatedReason: 对慢性非特异性颈痛且面临高人体工程学风险的工人，结合有氧和颈部/上肢阻力训练能更有效地即刻缓解疼痛和疲劳，并在 PPT 改善上优于单纯有氧运动。考虑将其作为急性疼痛管理策略。
items.titleZh: 有氧运动与有氧结合颈部-上肢阻力运动对高人体工程学风险慢性非特异性颈痛工人压力痛阈、疼痛感知和疲劳的急性影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验发现，在高人体工程学风险的慢性非特异性颈痛工人中，结合有氧和颈部-上肢阻力运动在改善压力痛阈（PPT）、疼痛感知和疲劳方面的急性效应优于单纯有氧运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: For workers with chronic non-specific neck pain at high ergonomic risk, combined aerobic and cervical/upper extremity resistance exercise acutely reduces pain and fatigue more effectively, and improves PPT better than aerobic exercise alone. Consider this for acute pain management strategies.
items.limitation: 本研究只评估了运动的即刻急性效应，长期效果尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: This study only evaluated the immediate acute effects of exercise, and long-term effects remain unclear.

items.curatedReason: Aspetar运动医学医院的腘绳肌损伤康复路径提供了一个经过实践验证的框架，你可以借鉴其理念，特别是在重返运动（RTS）阶段的指导原则，结合自身经验，优化你的腘绳肌损伤康复流程。
items.titleZh: Aspetar 腘绳肌损伤康复路径
items.summaryZh: Aspetar 运动医学医院发布了其腘绳肌损伤康复路径，为临床实践提供了基于该机构经验的标准化康复流程和重返运动标准。
items.curatedReasonEn: Aspetar Sports Medicine Hospital's hamstring injury rehabilitation pathway offers a practice-proven framework. You can draw upon its principles, especially the guidelines for return to sport (RTS), and integrate them with your own experience to optimize your hamstring injury rehabilitation process.
items.limitation: 该康复路径可能基于特定机构的资源和患者群体，外推到其他环境时需谨慎评估。
items.limitationEn: This rehabilitation pathway may be based on specific institutional resources and patient populations, requiring careful evaluation when extrapolated to other settings.

items.title: Comparative biomechanical strength of autografts for ligament reconstruction: quadriceps, rectus femoris, peroneus longus, patellar, hamstring configurations (quadruple and braided) and iliotibial band: an exploratory cadaveric biomechanical study
items.summary: An exploratory cadaveric biomechanical study compared the strength of various autografts (quadriceps, rectus femoris, peroneus longus, patellar, hamstring, iliotibial band) for knee ligament reconstruction, providing data on their comparative biomechanical properties.
items.curatedReason: 这项尸体生物力学研究比较了不同自体移植物用于韧带重建的强度。这些数据对你理解各种移植物的力学特性至关重要，能为你在术后康复负重、选择性保护方面提供更精确的依据。
items.titleZh: 不同自体移植物在韧带重建中的生物力学强度比较：股四头肌、股直肌、腓骨长肌、髌腱、腘绳肌（四股和编织）和髂胫束：一项探索性尸体生物力学研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性尸体生物力学研究比较了不同自体移植物（股四头肌、股直肌、腓骨长肌、髌腱、腘绳肌、髂胫束）在膝关节韧带重建中的生物力学强度，提供了其比较生物力学特性数据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cadaveric biomechanical study compares the strength of various autografts for ligament reconstruction. This data is crucial for you to understand the mechanical properties of different grafts, providing a more precise basis for postoperative rehabilitation loading and selective protection.
items.limitation: 这是一项尸体研究，其生物力学特性可能无法完全代表活体组织，且未涉及临床预后。
items.limitationEn: This is a cadaveric study, and its biomechanical properties may not fully represent living tissue, nor does it address clinical outcomes.

items.title: Beyond acute concussion assessment to office management: a systematic review informing the development of a Sport Concussion Office Assessment Tool (SCOAT6) for adults and children
items.summary: A systematic review informed the development of a Sport Concussion Office Assessment Tool (SCOAT6) for adults and children, aiming to guide acute concussion assessment to office management.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述为制定运动性脑震荡办公室评估工具（SCOAT6）提供了依据。你可以参考其内容，更新你对成人和儿童脑震荡的评估和办公室管理策略，确保实践与最新证据保持一致。
items.titleZh: 超越急性脑震荡评估到办公室管理：一项为成人和儿童运动性脑震荡办公室评估工具 (SCOAT6) 开发提供信息的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述为成人和儿童运动性脑震荡办公室评估工具（SCOAT6）的开发提供了信息，旨在指导急性脑震荡评估至办公室管理。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review provides the basis for developing the Sport Concussion Office Assessment Tool (SCOAT6). You can refer to its content to update your assessment and office management strategies for adult and pediatric concussions, ensuring your practice aligns with the latest evidence.
items.limitation: 作为系统综述，其质量受限于纳入研究的异质性和偏倚风险。
items.limitationEn: As a systematic review, its quality is limited by the heterogeneity and risk of bias in the included studies.

items.title: The correlation between spatiotemporal gait and pain in patients with musculoskeletal pain using smartphone-based gait technology: a retrospective cross sectional study
items.summary: A retrospective cross-sectional study of 3,595 patients found significant correlations between smartphone-based spatiotemporal gait parameters and pain severity in patients with knee and back musculoskeletal pain, with varying gait compensation strategies based on pain location.
items.curatedReason: 智能手机步态技术为评估肌骨疼痛患者的步态参数与疼痛相关性提供了便捷工具。可将这类客观数据纳入你的临床评估，以更好地理解膝关节和腰背疼痛患者的步态代偿策略。
items.titleZh: 使用智能手机步态技术评估肌骨疼痛患者时空步态与疼痛的相关性：一项回顾性横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 3,595 名患者进行的回顾性横断面研究发现，使用智能手机步态技术评估的患者，其时空步态参数与膝关节和腰背肌骨疼痛的严重程度之间存在显著相关性，且步态代偿策略因疼痛部位而异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Smartphone-based gait technology offers a convenient tool to assess spatiotemporal gait parameters and their correlation with pain in musculoskeletal pain patients. Integrate such objective data into your clinical assessments to better understand gait compensation strategies in knee and back pain patients.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性研究，无法建立因果关系，且数据主要来自美国诊所，外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective study, limiting causal inference, and data primarily from US clinics may limit generalizability.

items.title: The efficacy of virtual reality interventions for depressive ...
items.summary: A three-level meta-analysis found virtual reality interventions to be effective for depressive disorder secondary to other medical conditions, suggesting its potential as an adjunctive therapy.
items.curatedReason: 虚拟现实干预对伴有其他医学疾病的抑郁症患者可能有效。作为康复治疗师，你可以开始探索 VR 技术作为辅助干预手段的可行性，尤其是在神经或长期病患管理中。
items.titleZh: 虚拟现实干预对其他医学疾病引起的抑郁症的疗效：一项三级荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项三级荟萃分析发现，虚拟现实干预对伴有其他医学疾病的抑郁症有效，表明其作为辅助疗法的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: Virtual reality interventions may be effective for patients with depressive disorder due to another medical condition. As a rehabilitation therapist, you can start exploring the feasibility of VR technology as an adjunctive intervention, particularly in neurological or chronic disease management.
items.limitation: 三级荟萃分析可能包含异质性较高的研究，结果需结合具体疾病背景解读。
items.limitationEn: A three-level meta-analysis may include studies with high heterogeneity, and results should be interpreted in the context of specific medical conditions.

items.title: Evaluation of stroke-associated risk alleles in a multi-ethnic Singaporean ischemic stroke cohort
items.summary: A study in a multi-ethnic Singaporean ischemic stroke cohort evaluated 29 previously reported stroke-associated single-nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs), finding that some European-derived risk alleles are also relevant in Southeast Asian populations.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性遗传学研究提示，在东南亚多民族人群中，部分欧洲人群的卒中风险基因型也具有相关性。这提醒你，卒中风险具有复杂的遗传背景，尽管目前尚不能直接指导康复，但有助于你更全面地理解患者风险因素，并期待未来精准医疗对康复策略的影响。
items.titleZh: 多民族新加坡缺血性卒中队列中卒中相关风险等位基因的评估
items.summaryZh: 一项针对新加坡多民族缺血性卒中队列的研究评估了 29 个先前报道的卒中相关单核苷酸多态性（SNP），发现一些源自欧洲的风险等位基因在东南亚人群中也具有相关性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on a multi-ethnic Singaporean ischemic stroke cohort evaluated stroke-associated risk alleles. Although genetic, it helps you understand the complexity of stroke risk and suggests that stroke prevention and rehabilitation strategies might need to consider genetic differences in diverse cultural contexts.
items.limitation: 该研究主要关注遗传风险因素，未涉及康复干预，因此对临床实践的直接指导有限。
items.limitationEn: The study primarily focuses on genetic risk factors and does not involve rehabilitation interventions, thus offering limited direct guidance for clinical practice.

items.title: Weighted total genotype score associated with knee ligament injury incidence in adolescent female basketball athletes
items.summary: A retrospective analysis of 534 Japanese basketball athletes found that weighted total genotype scores were associated with knee ligament injury incidence in adolescent female basketball athletes, suggesting a role for genetic factors.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提示，综合基因型评分与青少年女子篮球运动员膝关节韧带损伤的发生率相关。虽然基因检测尚未普及，但了解遗传风险能让你在运动损伤预防中更具前瞻性，针对高危个体制定个性化策略。
items.titleZh: 加权总基因型评分与青少年女子篮球运动员膝关节韧带损伤发生率的关联
items.summaryZh: 一项对 534 名日本篮球运动员的回顾性分析发现，加权总基因型评分与青少年女子篮球运动员膝关节韧带损伤的发生率相关，提示了遗传因素的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that weighted total genotype scores are associated with knee ligament injury incidence in adolescent female basketball athletes. While genetic testing isn't widespread, understanding genetic risks allows for a more proactive approach in sports injury prevention, enabling personalized strategies for high-risk individuals.
items.limitation: 研究样本为日本青少年，结果的普适性可能受地理和民族限制。
items.limitationEn: The study sample consists of Japanese adolescents, and the generalizability of the findings may be limited by geography and ethnicity.

items.title: Clinical and biomechanical outcomes of rehabilitation targeting intersegmental control in athletic groin pain: prospective cohort of 205 patients
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 205 patients with athletic groin pain demonstrated positive clinical and biomechanical outcomes from rehabilitation targeting intersegmental control.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对205名患者的前瞻性队列研究证实了针对节段间控制的康复训练对运动性腹股沟疼痛的临床和生物力学益处。这为你的运动性腹股沟疼痛患者提供了明确的治疗方向，你可以积极将节段间控制训练纳入康复方案，以改善患者预后。
items.titleZh: 针对节段间控制的康复训练在运动性腹股沟疼痛中的临床和生物力学效果：205 名患者的前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 205 名运动性腹股沟疼痛患者的前瞻性队列研究表明，针对节段间控制的康复训练取得了积极的临床和生物力学成果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study of 205 patients confirms the clinical and biomechanical benefits of rehabilitation targeting intersegmental control for athletic groin pain. This provides a clear treatment direction for your patients with athletic groin pain, and you can actively incorporate intersegmental control training into rehabilitation programs to improve patient outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究设计为前瞻性队列研究，缺乏随机对照，结果可能存在混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: The study design is a prospective cohort study, lacking randomized controls, and results may be subject to confounding factors.
